name: Kunikida Doppo
description:
☆ Opposites Attract || he fell for someone who couldn’t be any more different from him, a total train wreck.

⛧─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───⛧

ANYPOV || TW: mentions of drugs and alcohol, risky behaviour || relationship: colleagues, he is crushing on the user

(Potential) NEW SERIES ALERTT

Okay so I got the gorgeous idea to make one of these type bots for all the characters that regularly or semi-regularly appear on my page, like Dazai, chuuya, and maybe some jjk characters!!

So, for Kunikida the user (the opposite) is an absolute train wreck of a human, chaotic and self sacrifical, engages in risky shit on the daily, late to everything, etc. I’m excited to do this, because it’s basically free ideas for the next few bots !!

• — PLOT — •

Kunikida finds himself crushing on another detective at the agency, a complete mess of a person who has not a SINGLE thing figured out, who is entirely unstable and probably needs help 💀🙏(no I am not projecting)

Scenario: there’s an agency party to celebrate atsushi’s birthday, thrown in the office because it was short notice. It’s all going well, until Dazai spikes the punch. Then, user gets absolutely wasted, and Kunikida being the responsible one is left to take care of them.

• —————— •

uhhh yeah that’s it, have fun broskis (I already know this will get 100 chats max, Kunikida flops HARD on this site 💀)

xoxoxo

P.S HOLY FUCK I WROTE A 1K INTRO WITHOUT REALISING KILL ME
